title: Adi Maane Song Lyrics Athangudi Ilayaraja
stanzas:
Adi Maane Song Lyrics Athangudi Ilayaraja Album
#AthangudiIlayaraja

Adi maane maragathame
yen manasu kaetha
poonjaaramae

maaman enna
yaen verutha.
en manasa sundi
yaen ilutha.

maane maragathame
yen manasu kaetha
poonjaaramae

Adi maane maragathame
yen manasu kaetha
poonjaaramae

maaman enna
yaen verutha.
en manasa sundi
yaen ilutha.

Adi maane maragathame
yen manasu kaetha
poonjaaramae

vetti poatta nagathunduthaan
vennilavaa theriyudhadi
(mudikku)
sikku edukkum seeppulathaan
manasu sikki thavikkudhadi (2)

aarum oadum kadala sera
en aasa oadum unna sera
en aasa oadum unna sera

azhage alli kodiye
aymponnaana porsilaye (2)

anbae enna yaen verutha
aadharava thara marutha
un aadharava thara marutha

kattik karumbu gaana kuyile
kalla sirippumkolludhadi..
kaathukedakku kayiru kattil
kattikka nee illaiyadi.(2)

kaalam kai koodumadi
naan kanda kanavum
palikkumadi
naan kanda kanavum
palikkumadi

kannae karunguyile
en kadhal kani amudhe
adi kannae karunguyile
en kadhal kani amudhe

pettiyadi emmanasu
pokkishamaa unna vachchen
pottu vacha poonguiyile
unnathaane naan nenachen.(2)

piththaana emmanasil
muththaaga unmugamthaan

maane maragathame
yen manasu kaetha
poonjaaramae

azhage alli kodiye
aymponnaana porsilaye

kannae karunguyile
en kadhal kani amudhe

maaman enna
yaen verutha.
en manasa sundi
yaen ilutha.
maane......

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for Adi Maane?

The music for Adi Maane was composed by the legendary Ilayaraja.

What is the theme of the song?

The song portrays a romantic and emotional theme, resonating deeply with its listeners.

When was the song Adi Maane released?

The song was released on December 26, 2016.

What album does the song belong to?

The song is part of the album Athangudi.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, nostalgia, and serenity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song "Adi Maane" from the album "Athangudi" is a melodious and heartfelt composition by Ilayaraja, released in 2016. Its lyrics and tune convey a romantic and nostalgic atmosphere, resonating deeply with listeners. The song's folk-inspired melody and emotional depth make it a perfect choice for moments of reflection and celebration. It stands as a testament to the timeless appeal of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adi Maane, a captivating track from the album Athangudi, enchants listeners with its melodious tune and heartfelt lyrics. This song, composed by the legendary Ilayaraja, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. Dive into this musical masterpiece and experience the magic of Tamil music at its finest.
stanzaMeanings: Adi Maane Song Lyrics Athangudi Ilayaraja Album #AthangudiIlayaraja
Oh dear, my precious one, my heart longs for you.
Why are you upset with me, uncle? Why do you trouble my heart?

The moonlight shines through the gaps, and my heart is caught and restless.
Like rivers meeting the sea, my desire flows to meet you.
Oh beauty, like a jasmine vine, adorned with golden ornaments.
My love, why are you upset with me? Why do you withhold your support?
The sweet song of the koel bird captivates me, but you are not here to tie the knot of love.
Time will bring us together, and the dreams I have will come true.
Oh dear, my dark-feathered bird, you are the fruit of my love, my nectar.
My heart is a treasure chest, and I have kept you as my precious gem.
In my crazy heart, your face is like a pearl.
